description: v3(T^k(n)-r)の分布とSyracuse軌道上の3-adic構造の完全解析

theorem1_T_mod3_determination.statement: For all odd n, T(n) = 1 mod 3 iff v2(3n+1) is even; T(n) = 2 mod 3 iff v2(3n+1) is odd
theorem1_T_mod3_determination.proof: 3n+1 = 1 mod 3 always. T(n) = (3n+1)/2^v = 1/2^v mod 3. Since 2^v mod 3 = 1 iff v even, result follows.

theorem2_T_mod9_complete_table.statement: T(n) mod 9 is completely determined by (n mod 3, v2(3n+1) mod 6)

theorem3_v3_lower_bound.statement: For all odd n with T(n)>1: (a) v2 odd => v3(T(n)-1)=0; (b) v2 even and v2 mod 6 != 2*(n mod 3) => v3(T(n)-1)=1; (c) v2 = 2*(n mod 3) mod 6 and v2 even => v3(T(n)-1)>=2
theorem3_v3_lower_bound.exceptions: Only T(n)=1 cases (n in {(4^k-1)/3}) fail condition (c), trivially

theorem4_v3_distribution.statement: P(v3(T(n)-1) = k) = 2/3^{k+1} for k >= 0, exactly matching the uniform random model

theorem5_conditional_geometric.statement: Conditioned on T(n)=1 mod 3, v3(T(n)-1)-1 ~ Geo(1/3). Similarly for T(n)=2 mod 3.
theorem5_conditional_geometric.evidence: All non-deterministic cases show ratio to Geo(1/3) within [0.96, 1.04] for v3 up to 7

deterministic_structure.description: Of the 18 combinations (n mod 3, v2 mod 6), 12 yield a deterministic v3(T(n)-1), 6 have stochastic v3>=2
deterministic_structure.deterministic_cases: v2 odd (6 cases) -> v3=0; v2 even, v2 mod 6 != 2*(n mod 3) (6 cases) -> v3=1

3adic_subordinate_to_2adic.description: T(n) mod 3^k is entirely determined by (n mod 3^{k-1}, v2(3n+1) mod ord_{3^k}(2))

orbit_v3_ratio.description: sum(v3(T^k(n)-1)) / stopping_time converges to ~1/2 for long orbits

markov_property.v2_parity_1step: No correlation detected (transition probs identical: 1/3, 2/3 regardless of current state)
markov_property.v2_parity_3step: No significant deviation from independence (all ratios within 1.004 of expected)

exceptions_to_theorem3c.description: All exceptions are n=(4^k-1)/3 where T(n)=1 exactly (one-step fixed points)
